outline.title: Biblical Hermeneutics
outline.summary: Welcome to Biblical Hermeneutics. Master the principles and methods of biblical interpretation. Learn how to properly exegete Scripture and apply hermeneutical tools for deeper understanding of God's Word.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Understand the principles and methods of biblical interpretation. This course develops your ability to properly exegete Scripture and apply hermeneutical tools for accurate biblical understanding.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Master exegetical methods and biblical interpretation. Understand grammatical and historical context. Learn to recognize biblical genres. Develop skills for proper biblical study and application.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering foundations of hermeneutics, grammatical analysis, historical context, literary analysis, theological context, exegetical methods, inductive study, difficult passages, and application.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and develop mastery of biblical interpretation. Equip yourself with the tools and skills to understand Scripture more deeply and apply it effectively in your ministry and spiritual life.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
